meta.description: Receives intelligence notification payloads from driftdriver and delivers them via Telegram. Supports four notification types: daily_briefing (morning stats + dashboard link), escalation_alert (inbox items with urgency), veto_reminder (24h before auto-decision window closes), weekly_digest (end-of-week rollup). Payload schema: { notification_type, summary, deep_link_url, urgency, signal_ids }. Uses DarklyFactory_bot credentials. Configure the webhook URL in ~/.config/workgraph/notify.toml under [intelligence_notifications].webhook_url.
